Defines the properties and identifiers for the SyntaxError.prototype built-in object in JerryScript.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines the properties and identifiers for the `SyntaxError.prototype` object in a JavaScript engine. It uses macros to declare the object identifier and its properties, which include the constructor, name, and message attributes. The `OBJECT_ID` macro assigns an identifier to the `SyntaxError.prototype`, while the `OBJECT_VALUE` and `STRING_VALUE` macros define the properties of the object, such as `constructor`, `name`, and `message`, with their respective attributes set to configurable and writable. The file concludes by undefining the macros to prevent any unintended reuse.
